[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110010 4
1 0011101 4
2 0111000 3
3 1100100 3
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1011011 5
7 0011001 3

01 10 1011011 5 match 6
12 21 0111011 5
23 32 1110010 4 match 0
34 43 1110010 4 match 0
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 0111101 5
67 76 1111100 5
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1111011 6
13 31 1111011 6
24 42 1110010 4 match 0
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 1111010 5
57 75 1111101 6
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 1111101 6

03 30 1111011 6
14 41 1111011 6
25 52 0111111 6
36 63 1111010 5
47 74 1110110 5
50 05 1011111 6
61 16 0111001 4
72 27 1100110 4

04 40 1111011 6
15 51 0011101 4 match 1
26 62 0111010 4
37 73 1110110 5
